description: Product Description Imagine a haven of peace in your home, filled with calming scents and a touch of vibrant colour. Introducing our Round Mango Wood Cone & Stick Burner, made with love in India! This beautiful burner isn't just functional, it's a stunning centrepiece that will add a pop of personality to any space. Whether you're an incense aficionado or just beginning your aromatherapy journey, our burner offers the perfect blend of functionality and design. Our Round Incense Burner features a clever design that caters to both incense cones and sticks. For incense cones, simply place the cone in the centre of the burner. For sticks, there are special holes in the outer ring where you can insert them. You can even burn multiple sticks at once, thanks to the four strategically placed holes. To use, light the tip of your incense cone or stick, allow it to burn for a few seconds, then gently blow out the flame. The incense will smoulder, releasing its soothing aroma. This design ensures that your incense burns evenly and safely, creating a mesmerizing display of fragrant smoke. We understand that your home décor reflects your unique personality. That's why we offer a variety of vibrant colours to choose from! Choose from rich red, calming blue, refreshing green, playful pink, classic black, or the natural beauty of untreated mango wood. We also offer a range of beautiful inlay designs to personalize your burner even further. Choose from the peaceful balance of yin and yang, the transformative power of a butterfly, the wise presence of an elephant, or the delicate beauty of floral patterns. We even have celestial designs featuring sun, moon, and stars, the strength of the tree of life, or the mystical pentagram. Each inlay adds a layer of meaning and beauty to your burner, making it a true reflection of your style. With so many options, you can easily find the perfect match for your home décor or personal style. Looking for a thoughtful and elegant housewarming gift? Our Round Incense Cone & Stick Burner is an ideal choice. Its versatile design, beautiful craftsmanship, and variety of colors and inlays make it a cherished addition to any home. It is easy to clean and maintain, ensuring it remains a lasting part of your home. This burner is a gift that brings peace, beauty, and delightful fragrances to their living space. Surprise someone special with a gift that enhances their home ambiance and provides a touch of serenity. Let our Round Mango Wood Incense Burner become a treasured part of their story.
